records.question: Which workshops named Anual Workshop 2011 had submissions by Jeff Lloyd from West Texas State that were rejected?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
JOIN submission ON acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id
WHERE workshop.name = 'Anual Workshop 2011' AND acceptance.result = 'Rejected' AND submission.college = 'West Texas State' AND submission.author = 'Jeff Lloyd'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 INNER JOIN Acceptance AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID INNER JOIN submission AS T3 ON T2.Submission_ID = T3.Submission_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Anual Workshop 2011' AND T2.Result = 'Rejected' AND T3.College = 'West Texas State' AND T3.Author = 'Jeff Lloyd'

records.question: What workshops include a date containing August 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
JOIN submission ON acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id
WHERE workshop.date LIKE '%August 18%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 INNER JOIN Acceptance AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID INNER JOIN submission AS T3 ON T2.Submission_ID = T3.Submission_ID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '%August 18%'

records.question: Which workshops taking place at the venue New Jersey USA include the date August 25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
WHERE workshop.date LIKE '%August 25%' AND workshop.venue = 'New Jersey USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Workshop_ID FROM workshop WHERE Date LIKE '%August 25%' AND Venue = 'New Jersey USA'

records.question: What workshops named Conference 2007 took place in London UK during 2007 where the acceptance result is Rejected?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
WHERE acceptance.result = 'Rejected' AND workshop.venue = 'London UK' AND workshop.date LIKE '%2007%' AND workshop.name = 'Conference 2007'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 WHERE T1.Venue = 'London UK' AND T1.Date LIKE '%2007%' AND T1.Name = 'Conference 2007' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Acceptance AS T2 WHERE T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID AND T2.Result = 'Rejected')

records.question: Which workshops named ABC 2007 held in London UK during 2007 included accepted submissions by Steve Niehaus from Notre Dame with scores of at least 72?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
JOIN submission ON acceptance.submission_id = submission.submission_id
WHERE submission.college = 'Notre Dame' AND submission.scores >= 72.0 AND workshop.name = 'ABC 2007' AND acceptance.result = 'Accepted' AND submission.author = 'Steve Niehaus' AND workshop.date LIKE '%2007%' AND workshop.venue = 'London UK'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 INNER JOIN Acceptance AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID INNER JOIN submission AS T3 ON T2.Submission_ID = T3.Submission_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'ABC 2007' AND T1.Date LIKE '%2007%' AND T1.Venue = 'London UK' AND T2.Result = 'Accepted' AND T3.College = 'Notre Dame' AND T3.Scores >= 72.0 AND T3.Author = 'Steve Niehaus'

records.question: Which workshops held in New York USA have the name 2008 qualification and include January 14 in their date?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
WHERE workshop.date LIKE '%January 14%' AND workshop.name = '2008 qualification' AND workshop.venue = 'New York USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Workshop_ID FROM workshop WHERE Date LIKE '%January 14%' AND Name = '2008 qualification' AND Venue = 'New York USA'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop

records.question: Which workshops named exactly Anual Workshop 2011 have accepted participants?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
WHERE workshop.name = 'Anual Workshop 2011'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 WHERE T1.Name = 'Anual Workshop 2011' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Acceptance AS T2 WHERE T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID )

records.question: Which workshops named Workshop 2007 have acceptance results that are rejected?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT workshop.workshop_id FROM workshop
JOIN acceptance ON workshop.workshop_id = acceptance.workshop_id
WHERE acceptance.result = 'Rejected' AND workshop.name = 'Workshop 2007'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Workshop_ID FROM workshop AS T1 INNER JOIN Acceptance AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_ID = T2.Workshop_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Workshop 2007' AND T2.Result = 'Rejected'
